handoff.title: Agent handoff prep
handoff.sub: One-time checklist (~1–2 hrs) before delegating purple AI handoff tasks. Secrets stay in a local file on your MacBook — never paste into chat.

backbone.title: Backbone — do this first
backbone.sub: Critical path: operator prep → network → NAS layout → Docker host. If backbone is mostly done, finish the remaining gates (nas-01 snapshots, glue-01 UPS) before Immich, Paperless, or off-site backup.

workstreams.title: Parallel workstreams
workstreams.sub: Independent feature tracks — run side by side after backbone. Suggested order: finish media verification → smart home or life apps → reading → photos (needs nas-01) → off-site backup. None block each other except where deps say SYNC.

operations.title: Operations & rebuildability
operations.sub: Glue layer in three waves: (1) AdGuard, Dockge, ntfy, Beszel, Forgejo — (2) Caddy + Uptime Kuma + Homepage — (3) Git the stack, Ansible fleet, SBOM inventory. Security hardening follows once backups and Caddy exist.

enhancements.title: Enhancements
enhancements.sub: Optional polish — Plex analytics, game servers, Apollo streaming, local AI. Gaming Phase 1 (WoL + Apollo) can start anytime; Tdarr and GPU policy wait on WoL / HA voice.

network.title: Network & remote access
network.sub: UniFi VLANs + zone firewall (one-way door), Tailscale mesh, SSH fallbacks, and security extras.

nas-foundation.title: NAS storage layout
nas-foundation.sub: Three-volume split, share exports, Container Manager — then nas-01 Btrfs snapshots (unlocks Immich + off-site backup) and glue-01 UPS/NUT.

docker-host.title: Docker host bootstrap
docker-host.sub: Docker Engine + /opt/stacks layout on the Mac mini — prerequisite for every Compose app.

desktop.title: Operator & desktop baseline
desktop.sub: prep-01 first, then glue-03/04 anytime. Remaining: glue-02 browser baseline, glue-04b fleet dotfiles.

smart-home.title: Smart home (Home Assistant)
smart-home.sub: Fully parallel — network backbone already unlocks this. Phase: HA Green → HACS + Hue/Nest → Midea/Zigbee → voice/cameras → LiteLLM fallback.

media-pipeline.title: Media pipeline (seedbox → Plex)
media-pipeline.sub: Core stack is live. Close out: seed-07 end-to-end verify → optional Soulseek branch (seed-09 → nas-29 → nas-30 beets).

photos.title: Photos (Immich)
photos.sub: Immich on NAS — blocked only on nas-01 Btrfs snapshots.

reading.title: Reading & portable media
reading.sub: Three entry points: (A) CWA + Calibre + Kobo, (B) iPod/podcasts on CachyOS, (C) Obsidian + Pinchflat anytime.

apps.title: Life apps (Docker)
apps.sub: Light Docker on Mac mini — deploy Miniflux + Navidrome + Wallabag + Mealie together; Paperless after nas-01.

backups-offsite.title: Off-site backup (recommended)
backups-offsite.sub: Recommended after nas-01: B2 Hyper Backup → restic/Borg → full restore drill (nas-07).

ops.title: Reverse proxy, monitoring & Git
ops.sub: Wave 1: AdGuard, Dockge, ntfy, Beszel, Forgejo. Wave 2: Caddy → Uptime Kuma → Homepage. Wave 3: Git stack, Ansible, SBOM, restore runbooks.

security.title: Security hardening
security.sub: MFA + patches + Docker log caps anytime. Immutable backups (sec-03) after off-site chain; CrowdSec (sec-04) after Caddy.

media-polish.title: Plex polish
media-polish.sub: All async — Tautulli, Kometa anytime; Tdarr + Maintainerr removed from plan 2026-07-08.

gaming.title: Gaming & streaming
gaming.sub: Phase 1: Apollo + Moonlight (rig 24/7; WoL = recovery). Phase 2: LinuxGSM servers. Phase 3: Ludusavi, RomM, GPU policy (needs ha-17).

ebook-mgmt.title: Ebook Management Improvements
ebook-mgmt.sub: Readarr permanent library + CWA copy-on-import, Libreseerr request portal — fixes inventory tracking and household book requests.

agent-handoff.title: Agent handoff prep
agent-handoff.sub: SSH check → secrets vault → optional B2/creds → sudo mode → pick batch → run agent → verify → cleanup.

audit-fixes.title: Audit fixes — 2026-07-07 fleet audit
audit-fixes.sub: Run 0 repair batch: live breakage (DNS failover, crash loops, GPU cap), repo bugs (set -e, word-splitting, bad defaults), convergence (ansible-pull, subtree publish), drift, secrets hygiene, and placement decisions.

verification.title: Continuous verification
verification.sub: checks.d probe library → SSH runner + timer + ntfy on regression → local-LLM triage on the rig (small scoped skills) → auto-reopen regressions in progress.json.

home-surface.title: Home surface (home.tabaska.us)
home-surface.sub: Live service inventory → catalog file in repo → Caddy vhost reconciliation → Homepage rebuild by category with health widgets → polish.

wiki.title: Wiki (wiki.tabaska.us)
wiki.sub: MkDocs Material scaffold → generated service/script/host pages → seven core runbooks → deploy behind Caddy → wiki-in-the-loop drift check.

0.name: Repair & Trust
0.goal: Fix today’s live breakage and repo bugs; reconcile the tracker with reality. Exit: everything marked done is verifiably true, ansible-pull converges green, and git is the single source of truth.

1.name: DNS resilience & Verification
1.goal: Finish the fail-open DNS chain (mini → NAS → gateway) and build the continuous-verification framework — probe library, SSH runner, and local-LLM triage on the rig.

2.name: Home surface
2.goal: home.tabaska.us becomes the full categorized service catalog, the Caddyfile is reconciled against reality, and wiki.tabaska.us ships the user manual.

3.name: Backups & Security
3.goal: Complete the offsite 3-2-1 chain (B2, restic, Borg, restore drill) and harden security (MFA, immutable backups, CrowdSec). Gate: B2 credentials in vault + UPS hardware purchase.

4.name: Reading & Media completion
4.goal: CWA + KOReader + podcasts + iPod + Obsidian, ebook request flow end-to-end, plus remaining media polish (music verification, beets — Tdarr/Maintainerr removed from plan 2026-07-08).

5.name: Smart home
5.goal: Home Assistant through all integrations. HA is live on the LAN (192.168.10.50:8123, admin created 2026-07-07) but NOT on the tailnet and has no SSH add-on yet — first items: enable the Advanced SSH add-on, join the tailnet, and publish ha.tabaska.us via Caddy + Homepage. Physical gates: Hue bridge button, Zigbee coordinator, mic test, Apple Home pairing.

6.name: Gaming & AI
6.goal: Game servers (mini light slot + 24/7 rig), streaming polish (headless display, Moonlight), rig idle-power tuning, desktop baseline, and local-LLM apps.

7.name: Capstone: Rebuild-proof
7.goal: Rebuild drills, SBOM completeness, wiki completeness, verification green fleet-wide — the “reproducible, maintainable, understandable” proof. Then delete the vault and rotate keys.

_meta.description: AI automation tier for rollout tasks. auto = SSH/sudo + secrets vault, minimal human steps. assisted = AI does bulk work; you provide creds, OAuth, physical confirm, or spot-check. Omit = physical device, account enrollment, or subjective desktop prefs. As of plan v3 (2026-07-07) the per-task `mode` field in taskData is authoritative; this map is kept for backward compatibility.

auto.glue-04b: chezmoi apply on rig + mini — dotfiles already in repo
auto.docker-16: MusicSeerr compose deploy on Mac mini
auto.ha-12: Mosquitto + Zigbee2MQTT stack (needs coordinator plugged in)
auto.ha-15: Frigate on NAS compose (if cameras ready)
auto.ha-17: LiteLLM gateway compose + small fallback model
auto.nas-04: restic → B2 on Ubuntu (needs B2 app key once)
auto.dns-01: Unbound + AdGuard core on mini (done); resilience is dns-02–dns-05
auto.media-04: Removed from plan 2026-07-08 (was: Tdarr server on NAS + rig node)
auto.dns-02: NAS secondary AdGuard compose + rewrite mirror

assisted.nas-01: DSM Snapshot Replication — mostly GUI; AI can drive via SSH where possible
assisted.seed-07: E2E media test — AI triggers request; you confirm Plex playback
assisted.seed-10: E2E music test — same spot-check pattern
assisted.ha-02: HA Green onboarding — you plug in; AI finishes integrations
assisted.ha-03: HAOS VM — install-haos-vm.sh; you pick primary vs Green path
assisted.ha-05: Hue — bridge button press + LAN discovery
assisted.ha-09: Voice stack — mic test + Assist pipeline tuning
assisted.ha-14: UniFi Protect → HA — local API creds
assisted.ha-16: HomeKit Bridge — Apple Home pairing code on phone
assisted.ebook-06: E2E ebook verify — AI runs pipeline; you check Kobo/CWA
assisted.nas-02: Hyper Backup → B2 — B2 bucket + app key once
assisted.nas-03: Tier-2 HDD rotation — you plug drive in
assisted.nas-07: restore-test.sh — you confirm restored files look right
assisted.glue-06: Rebuild drill capstone — AI runs; you spot-check services
assisted.sec-03: B2 Object Lock + Healthchecks — cloud console + ping URL
assisted.sec-04: CrowdSec + forward-auth — API keys + test attack
assisted.game-02: AMP — first Minecraft instance via web UI
assisted.game-03: Heavy game servers — pick title + friend test
assisted.ai-01: ComfyUI / Open WebUI RAG — model download choices
assisted.dns-03: UniFi DHCP fail-open DNS chain — GUI on Dream Wall
assisted.dns-05: NAT :53 redirect + DoH blocking — UniFi GUI; gated on dns-04
